    capture_num_tokens: [1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 768, 1024, 1280, 1536, 1792, 2048, 2304, 2560, 2816, 3072, 3328, 3584, 3840, 4096, 4352, 4608, 4864, 5120, 5376, 5632, 5888, 6144, 6400, 6656, 6912, 7168, 7424, 7680, 7936, 8192, 8320]
    enable_piecewise_cuda_graph: true

results.benchmark_cmd: benchmark_serving.py --model /home/models/models--DeepSeek-R1-0528 --port 8888 --backend openai --input-len 8192 --output-len 1024 --random-range-ratio 0.8 --num-prompts 80 --max-concurrency 8 --num-warmups 8 --result-filename result_fp8_throughput_summarize_ep1_c8 --result-dir ./results_b200_fp8_mtp0 --metadata max_model_len=10240 kv_cache_dtype=fp8 kv_cache_free_mem_fraction=0.8 tensor_parallel_size=8 ep_size=1 dp_attention=false moe_backend=TRTLLM mtp_layers=0 piecewise_cuda_graphs=false random_range_ratio=0.8
results.config_yaml:
cuda_graph_config:
    enable_padding: true
    max_batch_size: 8
enable_attention_dp: false
print_iter_log: true
kv_cache_config:
    dtype: fp8
    free_gpu_memory_fraction: 0.8
    enable_block_reuse: false
stream_interval: 10
moe_config:
    backend: TRTLLM
